overrides.expect: b _ {i} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 0 & \text {if a_{n - 1} +\cdots + a_{i} is even, and} \\ 1 & \text {if a_{n - 1} +\cdots + a_{i} is odd.} \end{array} \right.
overrides.new: b _ {i} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 0 & \text {if \(a_{n - 1} +\cdots + a_{i}\) is even, and} \\ 1 & \text {if \(a_{n - 1} +\cdots + a_{i}\) is odd.} \end{array} \right.

overrides.expect: f ^ {\prime} (\alpha) = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} f (\alpha) + 1 & \text {if \alpha is one of the arcs \alpha_{j} in (a);} \\ f (\alpha) - 1 & \text {if \alpha is one of the arcs \alpha_{j} in (b);} \\ f (\alpha) & \text {otherwise.} \end{array} \right.
